layout.name: override
layout.title: Use Per-NPC Settings
layout.tooltip: When checked, per-NPC settings will be used for these settings in place of NPC config values.

layout.name: initialWalktime
layout.title: Initial Walk Time
layout.tooltip: The initial walk time when the NPC comes on-screen.

layout.name: walktime
layout.title: Walk Time
layout.tooltip: The time spent walking between beams.
